title: Anti-Air Beacon
description: Turn your old beacon into a powerful anti air defence!
body:
Turn your boring old beacon to a fancy anti air gun, simply by placing an end crystal ontop of your beacon, you too can defend yourself against flying menaces including, but not limited to phantoms, ghasts, vexes or blazes.

Laser range and damage depends on beacon level. Targets can be added/removed via config.
